reviews.review_description: I was playing minding my own buisness until the owner and a admin joined and trolled and i got banned for 1 week so the game is ok but the owners are abusing

The computer sometimes doesn’t work and sometimes works and almost every hallway. There is absolutely no lights making it hard to navigate the hallway unless you know what it looks like. The whole map is really dark so there’s some stuff that you can’t hardly see.

Pretty much the only thing you can do is just run around by cosmetics and talk to people. Oh wait there’s no people online because the game is pretty much dead. When the game gets more things to do a higher average player count and most importantly, adds lights to the hallways I’ll rate it higher but rn this game isn’t good
